headline: Seeking Clues to Cencora (COR) Q2 Earnings? A Peek Into Wall Street Projections for Key Metrics
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for Cencora (COR), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended March 2026.
